languages.text: "Ведка, ты нужна своим людям. Случись что с тобой, это будет невосполнимая потеря для 32-го".
"Dunawski, your people need you. If something happened to you, it would be an irreparable loss to the 32nd."
languages.original_text: "Ведка, ты нужна своим людям. Случись что с тобой, это будет невосполнимая потеря для 32-го".

traits.locale_text: "Dunawski, your people need you. If something happened to you, it would be an irreparable loss to the 32nd."
"Dunawski, your people need you. If something happened to you, it would be an irreparable loss to the 32nd."
"Dunawski, your people need you. If something happened to you, it would be an irreparable loss to the 32nd."

languages.text: 「ダナウスキー、あなたの部下たちはあなたを必要としている。もしあなたが何かあったら、32番隊にとって、それは取り返しのつかない損失だ」
languages.original_text: "Dunawski, your people need you. If something happened to you, it would be an irreparable loss to the 32nd."

traits.locale_text: 「ダナウスキー、あなたの部下たちはあなたを必要としています。もしあなたが何かあったら、32番隊にとって、それは取り返しのつかない損失です」

languages.text: "Dunawski, halkının sana ihtiyacı var. Sana bir şey olursa bu, 32. Alay için telafisi olmayan bir kayıp olur."
languages.original_text: "Dunawski, your people need you. If something happened to you, it would be an irreparable loss to the 32nd."

traits.locale_text: "Dunawski, halkının sana ihtiyacı var. Sana bir şey olursa bu, 32. Alay için telafisi olmayan bir kayıp olur."

languages.text: «Dunawski, su gente la necesita. Si le ocurriera algo, sería una pérdida irreparable para el 32º».
languages.original_text: "Dunawski, your people need you. If something happened to you, it would be an irreparable loss to the 32nd."

traits.locale_text: «Dunawski, su gente la necesita. Si le ocurriera algo, sería una pérdida irreparable para el 32º».

languages.text: “杜纳芙斯卡，你的人需要你。如果你出了什么事，第32团可损失不起。”
languages.original_text: "Dunawski, your people need you. If something happened to you, it would be an irreparable loss to the 32nd."

traits.locale_text: “杜纳芙斯卡，你的人需要你。如果你出了什么事，第32团可损失不起。”

languages.text: « Dunawski, vos soldats ont besoin de vous. Votre mort serait une terrible perte pour le 32e régiment. »
languages.original_text: "Dunawski, your people need you. If something happened to you, it would be an irreparable loss to the 32nd."

traits.locale_text: « Dunawski, vos soldats ont besoin de vous. Votre mort serait une terrible perte pour le 32e régiment. »

languages.text: "Dunawski, Eure Leute brauchen Euch. Falls Euch etwas zustößt, wäre das ein unersetzlicher Verlust für das 32. Regiment."
languages.original_text: "Dunawski, your people need you. If something happened to you, it would be an irreparable loss to the 32nd."

traits.locale_text: "Dunawski, Eure Leute brauchen Euch. Falls Euch etwas zustößt, wäre das ein unersetzlicher Verlust für das 32. Regiment."
